top_signals.title: Stocks Slip as Mideast Flare-Up Lifts Oil, Yields: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Stocks fell while oil and bond yields climbed after fresh attacks in the Middle East fueled doubts over whether an end to the war is imminent.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Oil Shoots Up After Iran and US Exchange Air Strikes
top_signals.summary: Oil prices jumped more than 2% on Thursday after Iran's Revolutionary Guards said they targeted a U.S. airbase in response to a U.S. attack in the port city of Bandar Abbas.Brent crude futures LCOc1 rose $2.34, or 2.48%, to $96.63 a barrel by 0701 GMT…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Bit Digital extends $100 million loan facility to WhiteFiber, backed by Ethereum credit line
top_signals.summary: Bit Digital said advances may be funded through an Ethereum-denominated secured credit facility, letting it retain ETH exposure.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: European stocks open lower as traders assess chances of Iran peace deal - CNBC
top_signals.summary: European stocks open lower as traders assess chances of Iran peace deal  CNBC
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Osaka Municipal Assembly approves proposed council to discuss metropolis plan
top_signals.summary: The council may hold its first meeting as soon as next month if its establishment is greenlit at the prefectural assembly's plenary meeting next Wednesday.

top_signals.title: Most planned natural gas pipeline capacity additions in 2026 and 2027 originate in Texas
top_signals.summary: Developers plan to bring approximately 44.9 billion cubic feet per day (Bcf/d) of new pipeline capacity online in the United States in 2026 and 2027, according to our latest Natural Gas Pipeline Projects Tracker. Approximately 70% (31.6 Bcf/d) of this new capacity is already under construction. More than 66% (29.7 Bcf/d) of the capacity additions originate in Texas. Louisiana is second with 19% (8.4 Bcf/d) of total capacity additions.

top_signals.title: Sandvik introduces AutoMine Aura with 3D perception system
top_signals.summary: Company says this marks the most significant overhaul of its AutoMine system in two decades.

top_signals.title: Defense Metals signs rare earth MOU with Hanwha
top_signals.summary: The agreement comes as Hanwha competes for Canada’s multibillion‑dollar submarine program.
